current_pr.checks: green_on_historical_head; not sufficient for final release handoff

confirm GitHub Actions dependency audits on current PR head

blockers.title: Production env evidence is present outside the repository
blockers.evidence: RELEASE_ENV_FILE=../release-evidence-temp/production.env passes npm run review:release-env without exposing env contents
blockers.close_condition: keep the controlled production env file outside the repository and rerun npm run review:release-env plus npm run review:release-readiness on the final release head

blockers.title: Production LLM connectivity attestation is present
blockers.evidence: LLM_CONNECTIVITY_ATTESTATION_FILE=../release-evidence-temp/llm-attestation.json passes npm run review:release-llm; release-readiness with env and LLM evidence is saved outside the repo as release-readiness-env-llm-result.json
blockers.close_condition: keep the redacted attestation available outside the repository and rerun npm run review:release-llm plus npm run review:release-readiness on the final release head

blockers.title: Real Figma / Canva / design-token handoff is missing
blockers.evidence: no real docs/design_handoff_manifest.json, Figma/Canva source, or design-token artifact is present
blockers.close_condition: provide accessible Figma, Canva, Brand Kit, design_tokens_path, required flow coverage, YYYY-MM-DD review date, empty open_issues, and pass npm run review:release-design

blockers.title: OTA credential rotation attestation is missing
blockers.evidence: docs/ota_credential_rotation_attestation.json is missing and OTA_CREDENTIAL_ROTATION_ATTESTATION_FILE is not set
blockers.close_condition: provide a credential-free attestation covering platform rotation, backup cleanup, git tracking check, release-readiness rerun, redaction_checked=true, and pass review:release-ota-credentials

blockers.title: Formal repo-wide Codex Security scan reports are present
blockers.evidence: docs/security/codex-security/latest contains scan_manifest.json, report.md, report.html, threat model, finding discovery report, coverage ledger, reviewed surfaces, validation summary, and attack-path analysis report; npm run review:release-security-scan passes
blockers.close_condition: keep docs/security/codex-security/latest or CODEX_SECURITY_SCAN_DIR available and rerun npm run review:release-security-scan on the final release head

blockers.title: PR handoff state is not closed
blockers.evidence: Current review:release-external-state shows PR #2 is MERGED, mergeable is UNKNOWN, and the local worktree is dirty; .git/index.lock is absent and database/backups has no tracked files
blockers.close_condition: after release-readiness passes, set RELEASE_PR_NUMBER to the actual open non-draft final release PR, keep the local worktree clean, and pass review:release-external-state on the final head
